name: Brave Search

pricing.details: Free with ads. Premium $3/month for ad-free results and AI summarization.

description: Search engine with an independent web index, not reliant on Google or Bing results. Operates without user tracking or personalization by default.
rationale: Brave Search is notable for having built its own independent web index, unlike DuckDuckGo and Startpage which rely on Bing/Google results. No user profiles are built. The 'Goggles' feature allows custom re-ranking rules. Search quality for long-tail queries is improving but still below Google's level. Default anonymous search mode does not require an account.
